description: A parsing issue in the handling of directory paths was addressed with improved path validation. This issue is fixed in watchOS 26, macOS Sonoma 14.8, iOS 26 and iPadOS 26, visionOS 26, macOS Sequoia 15.7. An app may be able to access sensitive user data.
